use_cases: Full-page hero backgrounds for landing pages and marketing sites
Decorative section backgrounds in creative portfolios and agency sites
Atmospheric overlays for video streaming and media platforms
Branded backgrounds for feature sections in product showcases
Visual depth layers for immersive dashboard and app interfaces
ai_summary: An animated aurora borealis-style background component featuring multiple layered radial gradients in blue, purple, pink, and green that continuously morph and drift across a dark canvas. The effect uses CSS keyframe animations with alternating directions and timings to create organic, flowing movement. Perfect for creating immersive visual atmosphere in hero sections, landing pages, or as a decorative background layer in modern web applications.
